description: Detects command injection risks in PHP: shell_exec, exec, system, passthru, popen, proc_open with dynamic arguments. JSON version flags all function_call_expression nodes (cannot filter by function name without #match? predicate support). Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify this is not shell_exec(), exec(), system(), passthru(), popen(), or proc_open() with dynamic user input enabling command injection; use escapeshellarg() if shell commands are necessary
